title: Chef's Special: Osso Buco Milanese
description: Slow-braised veal shank with saffron risotto, gremolata and a rich white wine reduction.

title: Pasta Special: Tagliatelle al Ragù
description: Hand-cut tagliatelle with a slow-cooked Bolognese of beef and pork, topped with aged Parmigiano.

title: Soup: Ribollita Toscana
description: Tuscan bread and vegetable soup with cannellini beans, kale and extra virgin olive oil.
